## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Surge AI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing marketing and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website development progressing well, aiming for launch end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Events: Happy hour rescheduled to 17th, Quince dinner invites needed ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Shift focus from webinars to in-person tech talks at companies like Anthropic, Google](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Content strategy: Surge to own production, GrowthX to guide on types of content](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Exploring viral marketing tactics like strategic job postings for PR/engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

## Topics

### Website Development

  - [Launch target: end of next week on Next.js](https://fathom.video/share/Q8dsLnxXEYjfvsK8HBjH1Ce6GDz7j7yX?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
